'''Tendler Vek''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] gambler who cheated a group of nobles in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and was forced to flee to the [[Rim Worlds|Rim]]. He frequented the [[CrossWind Saloon]] in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]].

Tendler was smooth, suave and well-groomed. He frequently puffed on a [[Cigarra/Legends|cigarra]]. Born in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], he started out gambling after bad land deals bankrupted him and his family. He traveled through the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], winning a fortune before suspicious [[Noble/Legends|nobles]] began to investigate him. He quickly fled, spending most of his wealth in the getaway.

Tendler was always friendly and had a positive outlook on life. He was not prone to violence, and preferred to know everything he could about a situation before proceeding.

==Appearances==
